title: commiphora otjihipana
intro: Commiphora otjihipana is a species of tree found in Namibia, belonging to the Burseraceae family and is also known as the Namibian myrrh tree. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Commiphora otjihipana include relief from arthritis, wounds, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory properties, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Commiphora otjihipana include resin and essential oil, which can be used topically or taken internally under medical guidance.
